bluePatch.approach: allowlist mapping + role-gated modifier + custom revert

comparison.summary: The historic Dexible patch is unavailable, so I can only describe Blue's approach. Blue gates selfSwap's fill() loop with an admin-controlled approvedRouters allow-list, reverting with UnapprovedRouter before the arbitrary approve + low-level call sink that enabled the February 2023 transferFrom drain. The DexibleData struct is extended append-only (admin and initialized stay at slot 0, the new mapping lands at slot 1), preserving the diamond-storage layout at the original slot key.
